data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of 'Crew count and subcontractor tracking' but did not provide sufficient evidence to confirm this requirement. While the linked use case mentions crew counts (Concrete team: 6, Rebar crew: 4, Crane operator: 1), it lacks explicit details on subcontractor tracking, which is a critical part of the requirement. Therefore, there is a clear gap in the evidence provided to fully satisfy the requirement.
gaps: No evidence of subcontractor tracking functionality.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
